question: What is the probability that the daily average temperature at the French weather station at Martinique Aimé Césaire International Airport will be higher on each resolution date listed below than on 2025-06-08?
resolution_criteria:
Resolves to the value found at https://db.nomics.world/meteofrance/TEMPERATURE/celsius.78925.D once the data is published.

The exact value on 2025-06-08 is unknown, but the most recent known value (as of 2025-05-29) was 28.413. (The daily average temperature at the French weather station at Martinique Aimé Césaire International Airport.)
background: The history of Average temperature by day and by station for France - Degree Celsius - LAMENTIN-AERO - Daily from Météo-France is available at https://db.nomics.world/meteofrance/TEMPERATURE/celsius.78925.D.
